tabName:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, service = (service = null) ? "Unknown" : service
| filter is_broadcast != true service != 'Unknown'
| group count=count() by service, dst_endpoint.port, src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip
| group "Total"=sum(count) by service
| sort -Total
| limit 15

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, dest_port = (dst_endpoint.port = null) ? "Unknown" : dst_endpoint.port
| filter is_broadcast != true service != null
| group count=count() by service, dest_port, src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip
| group "Total"=sum(count) by dest_port
| sort -Total
| limit 15

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, id_orig_h = (src_endpoint.ip = null) ? "Unknown" : src_endpoint.ip
| filter is_broadcast != true service != null
| group count=count() by service, dst_endpoint.port, id_orig_h, dst_endpoint.ip
| group "Total"=sum(count) by id_orig_h
| sort -Total
| limit 15

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, id_resp_h = (dst_endpoint.ip = null) ? "Unknown" : dst_endpoint.ip
| filter is_broadcast != true service != null
| group count=count() by service, dst_endpoint.port, src_endpoint.ip, id_resp_h
| group "Total"=sum(count) by id_resp_h
| sort -Total
| limit 15

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Duration"=average(duration), "Source IP"=(array_agg_distinct(src_endpoint.ip)).to_string(), "Destination IP"=(array_agg_distinct(dst_endpoint.ip)).to_string(), "Proto"=(array_agg_distinct(proto)).to_string() by "UID"=metadata.uid 
| sort -"Duration"
| limit 10
Open/Active Long Lived Connections (requires Long Connections Pkg)

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, direction= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=false) ? "external" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "inbound" : "unknown"
| filter is_broadcast != true direction="outbound"
| group proto=(array_agg_distinct(proto)).to_string(), bytes=sum(orig_bytes) by src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip, direction
| sort -bytes
| let country=(geo_ip_country(dst_endpoint.ip)=null) ? "Unknown" : geo_ip_country(dst_endpoint.ip)
| columns "Source IP"=src_endpoint.ip, "Destination IP"=dst_endpoint.ip, "Destination Country"=country, "Bytes"=bytes, "Proto"=proto
| limit 10
Top Outbound Data Flows by Originator (id_orig_h) Bytes

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, direction= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=false) ? "external" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "inbound" : "unknown"
| filter is_broadcast != true direction="inbound"
| group proto=(array_agg_distinct(proto)).to_string(), bytes=sum(orig_bytes) by src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip, direction
| sort -bytes
| let country=(geo_ip_country(dst_endpoint.ip)=null) ? "Unknown" : geo_ip_country(dst_endpoint.ip)
| columns "Source IP"=src_endpoint.ip, "Destination IP"=dst_endpoint.ip, "Country"=country, "Bytes"=bytes, "Proto"=proto
| limit 10
Top Inbound Data Flows by Originator (id_orig_h) Bytes

graphs:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, record_type=(qtype_name=null) ? 'unknown' : qtype_name, id_orig_h=(src_endpoint.ip=null) ? 'unknown' : src_endpoint.ip, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query, reply_code=(rcode_name=null) ? 'unknown' : rcode_name
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group count=count() by record_type, id_orig_h, query, reply_code
| group count=sum(count) by record_type
| sort -count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, record_type=(qtype_name=null) ? 'unknown' : qtype_name, id_orig_h=(src_endpoint.ip=null) ? 'unknown' : src_endpoint.ip, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query, reply_code=(rcode_name=null) ? 'unknown' : rcode_name
| filter is_broadcast != true record_type != 'PTR'
| group count() by record_type, id_orig_h, query, reply_code
| group count=count() by query
| sort -count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, record_type=(qtype_name=null) ? 'unknown' : qtype_name, id_orig_h=(src_endpoint.ip=null) ? 'unknown' : src_endpoint.ip, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query, reply_code=(rcode_name=null) ? 'unknown' : rcode_name
| filter is_broadcast != true record_type != 'PTR' reply_code="NXDOMAIN"
| group count() by record_type, id_orig_h, query, reply_code
| group count=count() by query
| sort -count
| limit 10
Top 10 Queries by Count to Non-Existent Domains

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, record_type=(qtype_name=null) ? 'unknown' : qtype_name, id_orig_h=(src_endpoint.ip=null) ? 'unknown' : src_endpoint.ip, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query, reply_code=(rcode_name=null) ? 'unknown' : rcode_name
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group count=count() by record_type, id_orig_h, query, reply_code
| group count=sum(count) by id_orig_h
| sort -count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns' AND qtype_name = 'PTR' AND rcode_name="NOERROR"
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group count=count() by query
| sort -count
| limit 10
Top Successful Reverse Queries by Count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'dns' AND qtype_name = 'PTR' rcode_name="NXDOMAIN"
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false, query=(query=null) ? 'unknown' : query
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group count=count() by query
| sort -count
| limit 10
Top Reverse Queries by Count to Non-Existent Domains

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files' AND mime_type != 'application/pkix-cert' AND mime_type=*
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Mime Type"=count() by mime_type
| sort -"Mime Type"
| limit 20
Top 20 Mime Types by File Count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files' AND mime_type='application/x-dosexec' AND mime_type=* AND !(filename contains 'exe')
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Count"=count() by "Mime Type"=mime_type, "Filename"=filename
| sort -"Count"
| limit 15
Corelight Mime Type to Filename Check

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files' | let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false | filter is_broadcast != true | columns uid, seen_bytes, timestamp),
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let directional= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "sent" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "received" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : "unknown"  | columns uid, directional) on uid
| group "# Files"=count() by timestamp=timebucket(), directional
| transpose directional on timestamp

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files' AND mime_type!='application/pkix-cert'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "File Count"=count() by source
| sort -"File Count"
| limit 10
Top File Protocols by File Count

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files' | let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false | filter is_broadcast != true | columns uid, seen_bytes, timestamp),
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let directional= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "sent" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "received" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : "unknown"  | columns uid, directional) on uid
| group "Bytes"=sum(seen_bytes) by timestamp=timebucket(), directional
| transpose directional on timestamp

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Source_File_Count"=count() by "Source Host"=src_endpoint.ip 
| sort -Source_File_Count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Destination_File_Count"=count() by "Destination Host"=dst_endpoint.ip 
| sort -Destination_File_Count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Destination_Bytes"=sum(seen_bytes) by "Destination Host"=dst_endpoint.ip 
| sort -Destination_Bytes
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'files'
| let is_broadcast =  (src_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR src_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "0.0.0.0" OR dst_endpoint.ip = "255.255.255.255") ? true : false
| filter is_broadcast != true
| group "Source_Bytes"=sum(seen_bytes) by "Source Host"=src_endpoint.ip 
| sort -Source_Bytes
| limit 10

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| filter referrer != null
| group http_referrer=array_agg_distinct(referrer) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| group "Distinct Referrers" = estimate_distinct(http_referrer)
graphs.title: Distinct Referrers

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group user_agent=array_agg_distinct(http_request.user_agent) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| group "Distinct User Agents" = estimate_distinct(user_agent)
graphs.title: Distinct User Agents

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group distinct_hosts=array_agg_distinct(device.hostname) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| group "Distinct Hosts" = estimate_distinct(distinct_hosts)
graphs.title: Distinct Hosts

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group connections=array_agg_distinct(metadata.uid) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| group "Distinct Connections" = estimate_distinct(connections)
graphs.title: Distinct  Connections

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group rbl=array_agg_distinct(response_body_len) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| let rblv = rbl.expand()
| group "Average Body Length"=avg(rblv)
graphs.title: Average Body Length

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group ua=array_agg_distinct(user_agent) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip
| let user_agent = ua.to_string()
| let user_agent_lengh = user_agent.len()
| group "Average User Agent Length"=avg(user_agent_lengh)
graphs.title: Average User Agent Length

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http'
| group host = array_agg_distinct(host) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let host_header = host.to_string()
| group Count=count() by "Host Header"=host_header 
| sort -Count 
| limit 10
graphs.title: Top Host Headers by Count

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http'
| let id_orig_h=src_endpoint.ip
| group Count=count() by "Source IP"=id_orig_h 
| sort -Count
| limit 10
graphs.title: Top Originators

graphs.query:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http'
| group sm=array_agg_distinct(status_msg) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let status_msg=sm.to_string()
| group count=count(), percent=percent_of_total(count()) by status_msg 
| sort -count
graphs.title: HTTP Status Code Breakdown

graphs:
metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' 
| group user_agent = array_agg_distinct(user_agent) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let http_user_agent = user_agent.to_string()
| group Count=count(), Percent=percent_of_total(count()) by "HTTP User Agent"=http_user_agent 
| sort Count 
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http'
| group host = array_agg_distinct(host) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let host_header = host.to_string()
| group Count=count(), Percent=percent_of_total(count()) by "Host Header"=host_header 
| sort Count 
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND user_agent=*
| let http_method = method
| filter http_method = *
| group host = array_agg_distinct(host) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let host_header = host.to_string()
| group Count=count() by "Host Header"=host_header 
| sort -Count 
| limit 100000

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http'
| group host = array_agg_distinct(host), sc=array_agg_distinct(status_code), sm=array_agg_distinct(status_msg) by metadata.uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let host_header = host.to_string(), status_code = sc.to_string(), status_msg=sm.to_string()
| filter status_code=*
| group Count=count() by "Host Header"=host_header,"Status Code"=status_code,"Status Msg"=status_msg 
| sort -Count 
| limit 100000

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND host=* | columns uid, host, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'inbound' OR direction ='internal') | columns uid) on uid
| group host_header = array_agg_distinct(host).to_string() by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| group "Distinct Hosts Inbound"=estimate_distinct(host_header)

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND host=* | columns uid, host, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'outbound' OR direction ='external') | columns uid) on uid
| group host_header = array_agg_distinct(host).to_string() by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| group "Distinct Hosts Outbound"=estimate_distinct(host_header)

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND host=* | columns uid, host, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'outbound' OR direction ='external') | columns uid) on uid
| group host_header = array_agg_distinct(host).to_string() by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| group Count=count() by "Host Header"=host_header
| sort -Count

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND user_agent=* | columns uid, user_agent, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 

(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'outbound' OR direction ='external') | columns uid) on uid
| group user_agent = array_agg_distinct(user_agent).to_string() by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| group Count=count() by "User Agent"=user_agent
| sort -Count

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND user_agent=* | columns uid, user_agent, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 

(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'inbound' OR direction ='internal') | columns uid) on uid
| group ua = array_agg_distinct(user_agent) by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| let user_agent = ua.to_string()
| group Count=count() by "User Agent"=user_agent
| sort -Count

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'http' AND host=* | columns uid, host, dst_endpoint.ip , src_endpoint.ip), 
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' AND service='http' | let direction = (local_orig==true && local_resp==true) ? "internal" :  (local_orig==true && local_resp==false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==false) ? "external" : (local_orig==false && local_resp==true) ? "inbound" :  "unknown" | filter (direction = 'inbound' OR direction ='internal') | columns uid) on uid
| group host_header = array_agg_distinct(host).to_string() by uid, dst_endpoint.ip, src_endpoint.ip 
| group Count=count() by "Host Header"=host_header
| sort -Count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'software'
| group count=count() by name
| sort -count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'software'
| let version_major=(version.major != null) ? version.major : "", version_minor=(version.minor != null) ? "." + version.minor : "", version_minor2=(version.minor2 != null) ? "." + version.minor2 : "", version = (version_major="" AND version_minor="" AND version_minor2!="") ? "."+version_minor2 : (version_major!="" AND version_minor="" AND version_minor2!="") ? version_major + "." + version_minor2 : version_major + version_minor + version_minor2
| group "Count"=count() by "Name"=name, "Version"=version
| sort -Count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'software'
| group "Count"=count() by "Software Type"=software_type
| sort -Count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'software'
| let version_major=(version.major != null) ? version.major : "", version_minor=(version.minor != null) ? "." + version.minor : "", version_minor2=(version.minor2 != null) ? "." + version.minor2 : "", version = (version_major="" AND version_minor="" AND version_minor2!="") ? "."+version_minor2 : (version_major!="" AND version_minor="" AND version_minor2!="") ? version_major + "." + version_minor2 : version_major + version_minor + version_minor2
| columns "Time"=time, "Sensor Name"=_system_name, "Source Host"=host, "Name"=name, "Version"=version, "Version Details"=version.addl, "Software Type"=software_type
| limit 100000

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'ssl' | columns uid, "ssl_subject"=subject, "ssl_subject_common_name"=server_name),
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let direction= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=false) ? "external" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "inbound" : "unknown" | filter direction=* | columns uid) on uid
| let c_id= (ssl_subject != null) ? ssl_subject : (ssl_subject_common_name != null) ? ssl_subject_common_name : "unknown"
| group "Count"=count(), "Percent"=percent_of_total(count()) by "Certificate ID"=c_id
| sort -Count
| limit 10

| join 
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'ssl' AND validation_status=* | columns uid, validation_status),
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let direction= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=false) ? "external" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "inbound" : "unknown" | filter (direction="inbound" OR direction="internal") | columns uid) on uid
| group "Count"=count(), "Percent"=percent_of_total(count()) by "Validation Status"=validation_status
| sort -Count
| limit 10

| join
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'ssl' AND cipher=* | columns uid, cipher),
(metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'conn' | let direction= (local_orig=true AND local_resp=true) ? "internal" : (local_orig=true AND local_resp=false) ? "outbound" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=false) ? "external" : (local_orig=false AND local_resp=true) ? "inbound" : "unknown" | filter direction=* | columns uid) on uid
| group "count"=count(), "percent"=percent_of_total(count()) by cipher
| sort -count

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'x509'
| group "count"=count(), "percent"=percent_of_total(count()) by ssl_subject=certificate.subject
| sort -count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'x509'
| group "count"=count(), "percent"=percent_of_total(count()) by ssl_subject=certificate.subject
| sort count
| limit 10

metadata.product.vendor_name = 'Corelight' AND metadata.log_name = 'x509'
| let not_valid_after_epoch = strptime(certificate.not_valid_after, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.000000Z"),  current_time_epoch = now(), expired=current_time_epoch - not_valid_after_epoch
| filter expired > 0
| columns certificate.not_valid_after, certificate.subject
